---
title: Deep Document
format: html
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: true
      ensureCssRegexMatches:
        - ["--bs-primary:.*#2c3e50"]
        - []
---

## Deep Document

This document is in `chapters/deep/` which has a `_metadata.yml` with no
theme. It should inherit flatly from `chapters/_metadata.yml`.
